examples: I like to macerate the food in liqueur for a few minutes before serving.

Cherry liqueur on the left, cornel - on the right!
Drambuie, the whisky liqueur company, has been hit hard by the economic crisis in Greece.
The executive chairman of the Drambuie Liqueur Company, Phil Parnell, has died after a short illness.
